title: Feedback - the thank you card after sending the feedback
scenario: After sending feedback, a thank you note should appear and either auto-dismiss after 5 seconds or be dismissible via a back button.
steps: Send feedback via the feedback form or mechanism.
Alternatively, click the back button (if available) before 5 seconds elapse.
expected: A thank you card/note appears after sending feedback. It should either disappear automatically after 5 seconds, or the user can click a back button to dismiss it immediately.
